property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Apache NetBeans\jdk\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\java8path;C:\Program Files (x86)\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25.0.2\bin;C:\apache-maven\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\mingw64\bin;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\ASUS\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: Lender successfully funds a loan
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Lender successfully funds a loan &amp#27;[90m# features/funding.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with status &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"FUNDING"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_status(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma lender has sufficient balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.a_lender_has_sufficient_balance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan receives funding of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m500000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from the lender&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_receives_funding_of_from_the_lender(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funded amount should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m500000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funded_amount_should_be(long)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Loan funded by multiple lenders
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Loan funded by multiple lenders &amp#27;[90m# features/funding.feature:9&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with target amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_target_amount(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan receives funding of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m400000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from lender A&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_receives_funding_of_from_lender_a(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan receives funding of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m600000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from lender B&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_receives_funding_of_from_lender_b(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funded amount should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funded_amount_should_be(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan should be fully funded&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_should_be_fully_funded()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Remaining funding is calculated correctly
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Remaining funding is calculated correctly &amp#27;[90m# features/funding.feature:16&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with target amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_target_amount(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funded amount is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m300000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funded_amount_is(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system checks remaining funding needed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_system_checks_remaining_funding_needed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe remaining funding should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m700000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_remaining_funding_should_be(long)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Funding cannot exceed loan target amount
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Funding cannot exceed loan target amount &amp#27;[90m# features/funding.feature:22&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with target amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_target_amount(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funded amount is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m900000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funded_amount_is(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma lender has sufficient balance&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.a_lender_has_sufficient_balance()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan receives funding of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from the lender&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_receives_funding_of_from_the_lender(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the funding&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_system_should_reject_the_funding()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funding error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Exceeds loan target amount"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funding_error_message_should_be_shown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Lender cannot fund with insufficient balance
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Lender cannot fund with insufficient balance &amp#27;[90m# features/funding.feature:30&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with status &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"FUNDING"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_status(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma lender has balance of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.a_lender_has_balance_of(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan receives funding of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m500000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m from the lender&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_loan_receives_funding_of_from_the_lender(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the funding&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_system_should_reject_the_funding()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funding error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Insufficient balance"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funding_error_message_should_be_shown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Successful loan application
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Successful loan application &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_application.feature:3&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma borrower is registered and verified&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.aBorrowerIsRegisteredAndVerified()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe borrower applies for a loan of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theBorrowerAppliesForALoanOf(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan should be created&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theLoanShouldBeCreated()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan status should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"APPLIED"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theLoanStatusShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Loan application fails due to invalid amount
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Loan application fails due to invalid amount &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_application.feature:9&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma borrower is registered and verified&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.aBorrowerIsRegisteredAndVerified()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe borrower applies for a loan of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m-500000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theBorrowerAppliesForALoanOf(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the loan application&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theSystemShouldRejectTheLoanApplication()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32man error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Invalid loan amount"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.anErrorMessageShouldBeShown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Loan transitions from APPLIED to FUNDING
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Loan transitions from APPLIED to FUNDING &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_state.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma loan exists with status APPLIED&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.a_loan_exists_with_status_applied()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system starts the funding process&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_system_starts_the_funding_process()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan status should change to FUNDING&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_loan_status_should_change_to_funding()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Loan becomes FULLY FUNDED
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Loan becomes FULLY FUNDED &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_state.feature:11&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma loan exists with status FUNDING&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.a_loan_exists_with_status_funding()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe total collected funds have reached the target&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_total_collected_funds_have_reached_the_target()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system checks the funding status&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_system_checks_the_funding_status()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe loan status should change to FULLY_FUNDED&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_loan_status_should_change_to_fully_funded()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Illegal transition is rejected by the system
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Illegal transition is rejected by the system &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_state.feature:17&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma loan exists with status APPLIED&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.a_loan_exists_with_status_applied()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system tries to directly change status to DISBURSED&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_system_tries_to_directly_change_status_to_disbursed()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should throw an error due to invalid transition&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanStateStepDef.the_system_should_throw_an_error_due_to_invalid_transition()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Unverified borrower is rejected when applying for a loan
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Unverified borrower is rejected when applying for a loan &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_validation.feature:6&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma borrower is registered but not verified&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.aBorrowerIsRegisteredButNotVerified()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe borrower applies for a loan of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theBorrowerAppliesForALoanOf(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the loan application&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theSystemShouldRejectTheLoanApplication()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32man error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Borrower not verified"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.anErrorMessageShouldBeShown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Loan application is rejected when amount is zero
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Loan application is rejected when amount is zero &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_validation.feature:12&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma borrower is registered and verified&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.aBorrowerIsRegisteredAndVerified()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe borrower applies for a loan of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theBorrowerAppliesForALoanOf(int)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the loan application&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.theSystemShouldRejectTheLoanApplication()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32man error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Invalid loan amount"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.LoanValidationStepDef.anErrorMessageShouldBeShown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Investment is rejected when it would exceed the loan target amount
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Investment is rejected when it would exceed the loan target amount &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_validation.feature:18&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with target amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_target_amount(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funded amount is &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m900000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funded_amount_is(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma lender has sufficient balance of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.a_lender_has_sufficient_balance_of(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe lender invests &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m into the loan&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_lender_invests_into_the_loan(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the investment&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_system_should_reject_the_investment()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funding error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Exceeds loan target amount"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funding_error_message_should_be_shown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Investment is rejected when lender has insufficient balance
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Investment is rejected when lender has insufficient balance &amp#27;[90m# features/loan_validation.feature:26&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthere is a loan with target amount &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m1000000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.there_is_a_loan_with_target_amount(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32ma lender has balance of &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m100000&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.a_lender_has_balance_of(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe lender invests &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m200000&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m into the loan&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_lender_invests_into_the_loan(long)&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe system should reject the investment&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_system_should_reject_the_investment()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe funding error message &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Insufficient balance"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be shown&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# com.p2p.lending.steps.FundingStepDef.the_funding_error_message_should_be_shown(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
